header.name: Merveilles
description: I develop web and mobile applications for clients.
I am currently pursuing a PhD in Artificial Intelligence at Rouen University.
I hold a Computer Science Engineering degree from INSA Toulouse, as well as a Mathematics degree from ENAC, with a focus on Operational Research and Optimization.
Additionally, I am passionate about research projects and data science, where I actively explore incorporating machine learning techniques into web development projects.

about.title: About Me
about.shortDescription: PHD Student at Rouen University, Computer Science Engineer from INSA Toulouse, Mathematics and Optimization double degree with ENAC, fueled by a profound passion for AI.
about.description: My heart lies in web and mobile development, complemented by a keen interest in machine learning and mathematics. Renowned for my autonomy, rigor, and dynamism, I excel in collaborative team environments and relish the challenge of mastering new technologies.

award.title: Second place in the programming contest
award.description: Achieving the feat of being the first to solve problem D, we secured two prizes.

items.text: Submitted a paper to ICDAR 2026 on State-Space Models for Historical Newspaper OCR.
Started my PhD in Artificial Intelligence at LITIS (Laboratoire d'Informatique, du Traitement de l'Information et des Systèmes), Université de Rouen.
Graduated with a Master's degree in Optimization and Applied Mathematics from ENAC (École Nationale de l'Aviation Civile).
Completed Master of Engineering in Computer Science and Networks at INSA Toulouse.
Successfully completed AI Research Engineer internship at Capgemini Engineering, developing LLM-based solutions for aviation maintenance text analysis.
Started internship as AI Research Engineer at Capgemini Engineering, working on Knowledge Graphs and Large Language Models for entity recognition.
Joined ENAC for a double degree in Operational Research and Optimization.
Completed Software Engineer internship at Sopra Steria, developing Java services for the French Ministry of Agriculture.
Completed Software Engineer internship at We Build Up, developing their company website and improving BIMView code quality.
Joined Junior INSA Services as Partnership Officer, later becoming IT Department Officer.

items.title: AI Research Engineer - Data Scientist
details: Conducting an in-depth literature review on utilizing Knowledge Graphs and Large Language Models (LLMs) to enhance entity recognition in aerospace maintenance texts.
Performing data preprocessing tasks to ensure optimal quality and relevance for subsequent analysis.
Implementing a state-of-the-art solution that integrates Knowledge Graphs and LLMs to improve entity recognition performance in aeronautical maintenance texts.
Writing and documenting the research process, findings, and implications for scientific articles.
items.note: This internship provides a unique opportunity to contribute to the forefront of natural language processing for aerospace maintenance, exploring the synergies between knowledge graphs, large language models, and entity recognition.

items.title: IT Department & Partnerships Officer
details: Maintain and optimize IT tools for team use.
Develop tools to enhance Junior Enterprise performance.
Cultivate and sustain enduring relationships with JIS partners.
Enhance, improve, and perpetuate relationships with JIS partners.
Foster the development and improvement of tools for team efficiency.

items.title: Software Engineer
details: Developed Java services for the French Ministry of Agriculture, enhancing digital infrastructure and efficiency.

Mastered the Java Orion framework to work on PAGODE, a secure application for electronic declarations and fishing activities, as well as LOGICS, an application for agricultural operation authorization.
Worked on 100+ Jira test cases for TeleAgape, ensuring the reliability of fishing permit requests.

items.title: Software Engineer
items.company: We Build Up · Internship, Versailles - FRANCE
details: Increased BIMView TypeScript code readability by over 10% by reformatting NextJS components and CSS objects.
Assured Quality Assurance by writing components and hooks unit and integration tests and multiple end to end tests using Jest and PlayWright.

details.text: Developed the company website using NextJS and TailWindCSS.

items.title: Python Developper
details: Designed and Created a Desktop App using Python and PyQT5 to create usernames and passwords for a WiFi center according to the time paid.
Increased the efficiency by 100% by eliminating the possibility of duplicate and increased the speed via python decorators.
